title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCLXXXV. Lullabies.
content:
Bye, baby bumpkin,
        Where's Tony Lumpkin?
        My lady's on her death-bed,
        With eating half a pumpkin.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. CCCLXXXV. Lullabies." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
